title: selaginella bernoullii
intro: Selaginella bernoullii, also known as Spikemoss or Resurrection Plant, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to tropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Selaginella bernoullii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
